description_long: This is a large, modern two-story house with a flat, multi-level roof and a spacious, open layout. The exterior features a mix of smooth concrete or stucco walls, large glass windows, and wooden or metal accents, giving it a contemporary appearance. The property is enclosed by a low perimeter wall and includes landscaped areas with trees and shrubs, as well as multiple outdoor seating and patio spaces. The house has a prominent covered entryway supported by columns, and several sliding glass doors provide access to the outdoor areas. There is a garage structure on one side, and the backyard includes a shaded pavilion or gazebo. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and integration with the surrounding environment.
description: A modern, two-story house with flat roofs, large windows, and multiple outdoor living spaces, enclosed by a low wall and landscaped with trees and patios.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway with a covered porch, columns, and a central patio area.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the garage, extensive windows, and landscaped garden with trees and outdoor seating.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard, shaded pavilion, multiple patios, and large glass doors opening to the outdoor area.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the full length of the house, roof structure, and additional outdoor seating areas.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and sliding glass doors
attribute_entryway_design: Covered entryway with columns, wide steps, and a prominent overhang
